commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh As they called them, so they went from them: they sacrificed unto Baalim, and burned incense to graven images. They called: viz. , Moses and Aaron called: but they went away after other gods, and would not hear. (Challoner) Septuagint, "As I called them back, or (repeatedly; metekalesa. Grabe has, "he called "meaning any of God's ministers) so they rushed away from my presence. "(Haydock) This sense appears preferable to the Hebrew.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: They called: Viz., Moses and Aaron called; but they went away after other gods and would not hear.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
